name: python3-geoip
title: python3-geoip
summary: Python3 bindings for the GeoIP IP-to-country resolver library
description:
Python3 bindings for the GeoIP IP-to-country resolver library
GeoIP is a library that enables the user to find the country that any
IP address or hostname originates from, using a database instead of
DNS.
.
This package contains the Python3 bindings for GeoIP, allowing to use
this library within a Python3 program.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-geoip because Python3 bindings for the GeoIP IP-to-country resolver library.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-geoip as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-geoip with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-geoip --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
